skills.name: fastapi
skills.why: FastAPI's own official skill - only if using FastAPI

notes: Framework knowledge lives in official skills/docs (Next.js bundles its own in node_modules/next/dist/docs and next dev >=16.3 generates agent rules); the kit only pins your project choices
Browser testing AND debugging are covered by the playwright MCP - skip agent-browser/webapp-testing, they overlap
Deploying on Vercel? npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill deploy-to-vercel
Can't find a skill for your stack? npx skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills teaches the agent to search the registry
Want the full lazy-dev toolchain (audit/review commands)? install the ponytail plugin - base.md already ships the distilled ruleset
